stem: A graph models the cost, in dollars, of a taxi ride for x miles. The line passes through the points (1, 7) and (3, 13). According to the graph, what is the cost for each additional mile traveled, in dollars, of a taxi ride?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The slope is (13 - 7)/(3 - 1) = 6/2 = 3, so each additional mile costs $3.00.
